message: Jake
Kristy
Günter
seems to be out.
No one is here.
Maybe they went out for a meal?
It looks like they haven't returned yet.
Even though I was shown in from the reception,
the seat was empty.
Suddenly, I glanced at the desk, and there was a file lying there.
Its spine said it was the record of Jennifer Rumford.
Jennifer Rumford? Could it be the chart of the actress Jennifer?
As I reached for the file out of curiosity, Günter returned.
Sorry to keep you waiting. I got a phone call.
Oh, what do we have here?
I had forgotten to put this away.
It seems Miss Dern has passed away.
Were you aware?
I watch the news at least.
Is it you again?

No one but me
is here. It seems a psychiatrist doesn't need assistants or nurses.
Every time I see it, it can only be described as bleak. A Frenchman would escape in three days, an Italian in five minutes.
The walls and floor are all in dark hues, and the shelves are filled with what appears to be medical books. The only decoration is a green plant on the windowsill.
Despite knowing about the death of,
there's no sign of agitation. Doesn't it bother them at all when a patient dies?
It's like they were anticipating the death of,
There’s a calmness that suggests to me it isn't uncommon for patients to suddenly die.
Their expression is completely emotionless, just like any other day.
It doesn’t feel good at all when someone you've had contact with dies.
Saying it doesn’t feel good is an unpleasant way to put it.
No, pardon me. It's not that I meant anything bad.
By the way, what brings you here today?
I thought there wouldn't be much to discuss between us anymore, or is there something else on your mind?
I’m going to be busy from here on out. It seems my research is about to yield some results. Hehe.
Does today’s visit have anything to do with Miss Dern's death?
That file on the desk, is it related to the actress Jennifer Rumford?
No, but if it were hers, what would you want to say?
No, I'm just curious.
Miss Dern was also your friend, so you must have shared quite a bit about her.
I truly appreciate that.
However, in the case of Jennifer, she is a famous actress and moreover, a woman who has no connection to you. There's nothing to talk about.
Yeah, well, that's true.
Is it a detective's habit to be so curious?
There's nothing I can say. I can't violate the patient's privacy.
According to one theory,
she reportedly attempted suicide, and I would like to hear your thoughts on that.
I think it’s unlikely she would choose to take her life on her own volition.
What makes you say that?
Certainly, she seemed to carry within her the trauma that could lead her to even kill someone.
However, that was merely a means of self-defense; I believe her nature wouldn't direct her towards taking her own life.
In the worst-case scenario, one could theorize that her fiancé who was in the car attempted double suicide, but it's probably just an accident, right?
I think it was an accident too. Given the location.
The road conditions there must be awful after it rains. It’s likely he lost control from speeding.
A person with a prominent physique like Guy often becomes a speedster to flaunt their strength.
Since she has passed away, I suppose it’s okay to mention this now.
What is it?
Actually, there was a time when I suspected she might have been involved in a serial murder case.
That is,
can you tell me the reason behind that?
The reason is simple. After she had become significantly unstable, murders would occur within a day or two, then her condition would improve.
I observed Miss Dern's condition and felt concerned that she might be connected to this murder case.
If no new dismembered bodies are discovered, perhaps,
is that what you're saying?
That's right. Unless similar incidents occur in the future, I'm still suspecting that she might have been the culprit.
At this point, though, it hardly matters. No one can punish her.
What a calm person, with little emotional fluctuation. Are all psychiatrists like this?
Hmm.
Did you suspect her?
She certainly did mention that people can kill.
But she remains tight-lipped about Jennifer. I'm sure she won’t say anything further.
to the place
and Jennifer
I can't believe even Yuriko was coming here, what a coincidence!
So if Jennifer is coming here, does that mean there's something she needs to go through counseling for?
doesn't seem like she would talk about Jennifer.
Maybe I should ask her directly.
Could it be that she was down at the party because she was dealing with something?
died leaving behind a mystery. Was she happy to die with Guy, or was it?
whether she was the culprit or not remains undetermined for now. However, even Günter.
suspected her, and that's shocking.
Were you happy?
Will the serial murder case end up unresolved like this?
is the culprit.
If that's the case,
no, I want it to be someone else.
Just in case,
if they are the culprit, the case should end here, but where are the victim's body parts?
